description: Configure GPredict for a remote stargazing trip by setting up a new default ground station named 'Cherry_Springs' at 41.6615 N, 77.8232 W, and 701 meters altitude. Adjust the minimum elevation setting to 20 degrees to filter out passes blocked by the tree line. Export upcoming satellite pass predictions for the International Space Station (ISS ZARYA, NORAD 25544) to ~/Documents/ISS_passes.txt and for the Chinese Space Station (CSS TIANHE, NORAD 48274) to ~/Documents/CSS_passes.txt. Login credentials: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
